brand.name: Paris Cuban Salsa
brand.logo_instructions: Text-based logo. 'Paris Cuban' in Playfair Display (Black, standard weight), 'Salsa' in Playfair Display (Italic) colored in yellow (#F5C518). No generic icons.

theme.rationale: An editorial, high-end magazine aesthetic elevates community photos into art. White backgrounds and stark black typography provide the classic print editorial framework, while the energetic yellow (#F5C518) injects the dynamic vibrancy of Cuban Salsa. Minimalist framing allows the photography to dominate.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Editorial layout. Avoid uniform squares when possible. Use masonry grids or generous edge-to-edge cover photos to break up the monotony. Photos must have breathing room.

event_card.container: Flat, sharp corners (borderRadius: 0 or 4). No drop shadows. Use 1px black or subtle gray borders to create tension, or go completely edgeless.
event_card.image: Max height 60vh. Fill width. Maintain aspect ratio.
event_card.content: Placed below the image with generous top padding (16px), styled like a magazine headline.

lightbox.container: Immersive full-screen. Background #000000. Hide status bar.
lightbox.controls: Minimalist white iconography (close, share, download) with safe-area padding.
lightbox.tag_display: Bottom sheet or floating bottom panel with a soft drag handle, white background, displaying a clean list of tagged names/handles.

forms.inputs: Sharp rectangular borders (border-width: 1px, border-color: #E4E4E7). Padding 16px. Background #FFFFFF. Focus state changes border to #0A0A0A. No soft pills.

tags.style: Small rectangular chips, background #F9F9FB, border 1px solid #E4E4E7, text #0A0A0A. Font size 12px, bold.

motion_and_interactions.navigation: Native stack transitions. Fast and responsive.
motion_and_interactions.lightbox_transition: Shared element transition (zoom from grid to fullscreen) is preferred, or a quick fade-in.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Buttons should instantly reduce opacity to 0.7 on press. No bouncy spring animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Expo Google Fonts to load 'Playfair Display' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body/UI).
Strictly follow the color palette. Backgrounds must be pure white (#FFFFFF), text pure black (#0A0A0A), accents yellow (#F5C518).
Avoid generic soft UI patterns (like heavily rounded corners and drop shadows). Rely on sharp borders (1px) and typography for hierarchy to maintain the editorial vibe.
Implement the 'Paris Cuban Salsa' logo exactly as requested: 'Paris Cuban' in Playfair Display (Black), 'Salsa' in Playfair Display Italic (#F5C518).
The Gallery Lightbox should use react-native-reanimated or a full-screen native modal. It must have a pure black (#000000) background for maximum contrast against the photos.
For the tag display in the lightbox, implement a clean bottom sheet containing a list of tagged names or @instagram handles.
Ensure the Instagram Story shareable link and native share sheet utilize Expo Sharing.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'testID' attribute (e.g., testID='event-card', testID='lightbox-close') for automated testing.
The Admin dashboard forms (create event, upload photos) should use brutalist styling: sharp input borders, large text, and bold yellow submit buttons.
